task: Write a Python function that parses an AWS S3 bucket name from an S3 URI (e.g., 's3://my-bucket/path/to/file.txt') and returns just the bucket name.
Create a JSON CloudFormation template snippet that defines an AWS IAM role with a trust policy allowing EC2 instances to assume it.
Write a regular expression that matches valid AWS access key IDs, which always start with 'AKIA' followed by 16 alphanumeric characters.
